summary: ThreeDScene cross product. Fixed BLUE a=(2, 0, 0). ValueTracker theta_tr rotates GREEN b=2(cos θ, sin θ, 0) through 5 angles. always_redraw: YELLOW parallelogram with vertices 0, a, a+b, b + RED cross-product arrow perpendicular (a×b). Live θ, |a×b|, |a||b|sin θ (match), a·b. Ambient rotation.
